snippet.title: @SaiAbhyankkar - Pavazha Malli (Music Video) | Kayadu | Shruti Haasan | Vivek | Thejo | Think Indie
snippet.description:
Here's the Music Video of "Pavazha Malli", Sung by @SaiAbhyankkar & Shruti Haasan, Lyrics Written by Vivek, Music Composed by @SaiAbhyankkar

Song Credits:

Song Name : Pavazha Malli 
Composed, Sung & Produced  : @SaiAbhyankkar 
Singers : @SaiAbhyankkar, Shruti Haasan 
Lyrics : Vivek 
Additional Vocals : Sanjana Kalmanje, Vaimu, Arjun, Elisa ,Shiva 
Synth & Keys : @SaiAbhyankkar   
Rhythm Produced by @SaiAbhyankkar 
Ethnic Percussions : @SaiAbhyankkar 
Kumbaaara Rhythms : Yanka Percussion Group  
Choir : The Indian Choral Ensemble (Chamber) 
Singers : Sushmita Narasimhan, Aparna Harikumar, Sivaranjini Chandramouli, Bavathayini Nagarajan, Sudharsan Hemaram, Shibi Srinivasan, Manikandan Chembai 
Choir Directors:  Kalyani Nair, Karthik Manickavasakam  
Chorus Recorded at 2BarQ Studios by Rajesh kannan 
Bass : Derick Mcarthur, Keba Jeremiah 
Accoustic & Electric Guitars : Keba Jeremiah 
Additional Rhythm : Kalyan 
Additional Guitar : Godfray Immanuel  
Tavil : Prasanth, Saravanan  
Nadaswaram : Parthiban 
Flute : Lalith Talluri 
Saxophone : Basanth Muralikrishnan 
Violin : Sivateja Mallajosyula 
Traditional Stringed Instruments : Tapas Roy 
Recorded at Neo Sound Studio, Mumbai by Pranjal Borah 
Studio Operation Head : Rajesh kannan 
Creative Consultant : Adesh Krishna  
All Recorded and Produced at Yolo Rechords, Chennai 
Sound Engineers : Rajesh Kannan, Abin Ponnachan 
Sound Design : A.M.Senthamizhan
Mixed by @SaiAbhyankkar at Yolo Rechords 
Mastered by - Rupendar Venkatesh at Yolo Rechords

snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlan’s allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#aspirants #AspirantsOnPrime #trailer #officialtrailer #webseries #primevideoindia

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | WILDCARD | Day 2
snippet.description:
The WILDCARD stage is live.

Teams now battle for one final opportunity to secure their place in the SEMI FINALS. The margin for error is gone and every match carries serious weight.

Only the top 8 teams from this stage will move forward.

One more chance. One more fight. Everything on the line.

Watch the WILDCARD live and see who earns their spot in the SEMI FINALS.

snippet.description:
Dhurandhar 2 Trailer Pre-Review By Deeksha Sharma. Ranveer Singh in Dhurandhar The Revenge Part 2 Directed by Aditya Dhar is the Most awaited Sequel to Dhurandhar 2025 Bollywood movie with Neve seen before Box Office Collection & Akshaye Khanna presentation. Dhurandhar 2 The Revenge Trailer Announcement silences the Clash with Yash Toxic movie as Dhurandhar 2 is set for 19 March release with the Most awaited Trailer of 2026. Dhurandhar 2 Trailer Surprise Cameos & Old New Characters with Bade Sahab Introduction- Full Movie discussion inside. Can Dhurandhar 2 Become the No.1 Indian Film of All Time? Do leave Comments below!

Expect aggressive rotations, clutch moments, and leaderboard drama as teams fight to stay in the race.

"90's Weds Genz" is a Telugu Romcom Web Series Featuring Sushma Gopal &  Mohit Pedada as leads.

snippet.title: Rai Rai Raa Raa Song (Telugu) | Peddi | Ram Charan | Janhvi | Buchi Babu Sana | AR Rahman
snippet.description:
Presenting the energetic Rai Rai Raa Raa Song (Telugu) from the film Peddi 🎶🔥

Starring global star Ram Charan and the stunning Janhvi Kapoor, this vibrant track brings electrifying visuals and captivating performances.

Directed by Buchi Babu Sana and composed by the legendary A. R. Rahman, the song delivers a powerful blend of rhythm, melody, and celebration. 💃🕺

Turn up the volume and feel the festive Telugu vibes!

#RaiRaiRaaRaa #Peddi #RamCharan #JanhviKapoor #ARRahman #BuchiBabuSana #TeluguSongs #Tollywood #NewSong #DanceHit

snippet.title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
ARMY - ARE YOU READY?! Let the countdown begin, pop royalty is back!

BTS members RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook reunite on the global stage for the first time to celebrate the release of their new album, Arirang. Catch the historic performance LIVE worldwide from Korea, only on Netflix.

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG. March 21 8PM KST / 7AM ET / 4AM PT.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82157128

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: Lamba Lamba Ghunghat Kahe Ko Dala | Mujhko Rana Ji Maaf Karna | 90's Bollywood Dance Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song Name: Mujhko Rana Ji Maaf Karna
Movie Name: Karan Arjun
Singer(s) : Ila Arun, Alka Yagnik
Music Director : Rajesh Roshan
Lyricist : Indeevar

Song Lyrics :

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup 
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Kya Kaheen Kar Aayi Tu Munh Kaala Re 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Kaanon Mein Batiyaan Karti Hain Sakhiyaan 
Raat Kiya Re Tune Kaisa Ghotala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Vo Bahanoi Tha Bahanoi Thahara 
Kyon Na Pahachaana Toone Piya Ji Ka Chehara 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bahanoi Ne Odh Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Rakhi Thi Chaadar Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Main Samajhi Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Piya Ka Hai Bistar Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Aadhe Bistar Pe Vo Soya Tha
Aadhe Pe Main So Gai 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata To Hoga
Chhitaki To Hogi Chhat Pe Chandaniya 
Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bhool Hui Mujhase To Kaisa Achambha
Kaisa Achambha Kaisa Achambha
Bahanoi Tha Piya Jitana Lamba
Piya Jitana Lamba Piya Jitana Lamba
Choor Thi Main Din Bhar Ki Thakan Se 
Padate Hi Bistar Pe So Gai 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi 
Mujhko Raanaji Maaf Karana
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Soch Rahe The Ham Sab Jaisa
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Toone Kiya Nahi Kuch Vaisa 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Mukhade Pe Tere Sach Ka Ujaala 
Raat Kiya Nahi Munh Toone Kaala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

#GupChupGupChup #KaranArjun #MamtaKulkarni #AlkaYagnik #IlaArun #RajeshRoshan

snippet.title: TORE KE LET RAHIYO (Song): Aashish Yadav | Khushi Kakkar | Neha Singh | New Bhojpuri Song 2026
snippet.description:
भोजपुरी संगीत प्रेमियों के लिए पेश है धमाकेदार गाना "तोरे की लेत रहियो (Tore Ke Let Rahiyo)" । इस गाने को अपनी मधुर आवाज़ दी है आशीष यादव और खुशी कक्कड़ ने। शानदार बोल लिखे हैं चिंटू राजा ने और इसका दमदार संगीत तैयार किया है चमन सिंह ने।

#ToreKiLetRahiyo #AashishYadav #khushikakkar 

Credits:
Featuring- Aashish Yadav, Neha Singh
Singers- Aashish Yadav, Khushi Kakkar
Lyrics:- Chintu Raja
Music :- Chaman Singh 
Video Director- Ashish Satyarthi
Project Manager- T-Series- Sonu Srivastava
Post Production- Vicky Ji
Editor- Papu Varama
Di- Rohit Singh
Dop -Rahul Yadav
Choreographer - Aslam Ji


SUBSCRIBE T-Series channel Hamaar Bhojpuri for unlimited entertainment
http://www.youtube.com/hamaarbhojpuri
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chhota  Farmani Naaz  Nagin Si Lugai  New haryanvi Song   The Prince Yadav
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Shiva  Panchal  
Insta id - https://www.instagram.com/shivapanchal_1480?igsh=MTE3ZWl0cWYwZnl4
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई | Official Video Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2024. Nanhe Nanhe Ghungroo Haryanvi Song Starring with farmani naaz hema chaudhary  
This Haryanvi Song Sung by rahul mulheda. Music given manish tyagi. Penned by Ravi Rangi. Copyright & Music label by NAAZ MUSIC

snippet.title: Sankalp - Official Trailer | Nana Patekar, Sanjay Kapoor & Neeraj Kabi | Amazon MX Player
snippet.description:
Amazon MX Player presents     
Sankalp - Official Trailer

About show: SANKALP is a premium Indian socio-political drama that explores how power is manufactured not through elections, but through mentorship and institutional control. Inspired by the ancient Chanakya–Chandragupta chronicles, the series reimagines political strategy for modern India, where classrooms replace battlefields and bureaucrats replace soldiers.

Starring: Nana Patekar, Sanjay Kapoor, Neeraj Kabi, Kubbra Sait, Mohd Zeeshan Ayyub and Kranti Prakash Jha

A JIO STUDIOS PRESENTATION & PJP FILMS PRODUCTION
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande 
Produced By: Dishaa Jhaa 
Directed By: Prakash Jha
Genre: Gritty socio-political thriller

About Amazon MX Player -
Amazon MX Player is India’s leading free, premium, ad-supported streaming entertainment platform, offering a massive library of trending web series, reality shows, movies, and international content — all FREE to watch. From youth hits and binge-worthy dramas to reality competition shows, Amazon MX Player is home to some of India’s most popular titles including Hip Hop India, Case Toh Banta Hai, Playground, Battleground, Crushed, Gutar Gu, Rise and Fall, Sisterhood, Campus Beats, First Copy, Pyar Ka Professor, Jamnapaar, I-Popstar, Aukaat Ke Bahar and many more. Love international content? Explore MX Vdesi, featuring top global shows dubbed in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu—including fan-favourites like Our Secret, Gen Z, Time To Fall In Love, W: Two Worlds Apart, My Deskmate, and more! With new shows dropping regularly across genres like romance, action, comedy, crime, thriller, K-drama, youth drama, and reality entertainment — there’s always something exciting to stream.

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: VALETI DAARU - IKKA - NEHA KAKKAR | PHENOM | LATEST SONG 2026 | BHUSHAN KUMAR
snippet.description:
The heat is on. Get ready to turn it up with this explosive new banger. Presenting the Official Video Song “Valeti Daaru” by IKKA x Neha Kakkar.

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series Present
Bhushan Kumar's "VALETI DAARU"

Credits:
Music - IKKA
Lyrics - IKKA 
Singer - IKKA , Neha Kakkar
Music Arranged By - Phenom 
Mix and Master - Ashock
Rebab player - Amar Sangam 
Phenom stylist - Power
Music Label - T-Series

Video Credits:
Production House: BLVCKHOLE MEDIA
Directed by Inflict
DOP: Atharva Patil 
Producer: Akshat Bhargava
DA/Chief AD: Sarthak Gorla
1st AD: Aashish Gelal
1st AC: Nain Haque  
Line Producer: Sumit Dubey
Head of Production: Harshit Bakshi 
UPM: Rohit Dubey 
Prod. Asst: Vikas Yadav
Prod. Designer: Vishal Pandey 
Art direction team: Vishal pandey and team 
Model Casting Director: Rahul(arbee casting) 
Model: Manya Chandra
Choreography: Serene Subarno & Mohit Yadav 
Dancers: Deepali, Yukta, ⁠Ishika, ⁠Manasvi, ⁠Rani, ⁠Suhani, ⁠Yashika, ⁠Alina, Tisha, ⁠Arti
Costume Stylist: Prabhjot Kaur 
Assistant Stylist: Ritika Kapoor, Muskan Gupta
Dressman: Riaz & Team
Gaffer: Saifi
HMU: Rohit Diwaker & Team
VFX: Prathmesh 
DI/Colorist: Atharva Patil
DI Asst.: Vishal Parmar
Steadicam: Bijesh and Team
Camera: Java Motion
Lights: Light and Lights 
Facility Team: Asif Malik & Team
Car Action Vehicle: Drifting Dynasty 
Bike Action Vehicle: Throttle Shrottle
Vanity: Ayan Vanity 
Genset: Ayan Genset 
Food: Maa Caterers 
Location: Raja Nahar Singh Haveli
Jimmy Jib: Rajeev
BTS: Mayank Goswami
Accounts: Mayank

#ValetiDaaru #IKKA #NehaKakkar

Lyrics:
Husn tera saaki saaki
Big booty babe sunti hai Taki Taki
Yo, bohot teekhi like wasabi, haanji
Tu seene pe gire jaise kamikaze
Mujhse zyada tere peeche paparazzi
I wanna get tipsy, so more glasses
Aankhein teri jaana meri jaan ki pyaasi
Put your drinks up, 'cause we came to party

Main suit payeya kaale rang da, kaale rang da
Bazaar 'ch chann koi chaddoon
Panjeba chann chann kardi, chann chann kardi
Jab chaloon toh bande maroon

Nain naini lake varge, lake varge
Paani mein kise utaaron
Figure kartoos jatti da, barood jatti da
Husn Valeti Daaru

Tu aafat hai, tu aafat hai
Lachke toh kaala naag lage
Taapmaan badh jaata hai
Jab tu naache toh aag lage

Teri kamli jawani ka na tod
Jo bhi kar rahi tu kar baby aur
The way you go down laga ke poora zor
Tod degi lagta club ka floor

Don’t hurt nobody when you move that thing
Ka se kamariya jab DJ kare spin
Cha se chamakta paseena on the skin
Ga se gatak gayi pauni bottle, tu gin

Fa se tu phasa phasa dress daale hai
Ha se hawa mein khule baal kaale hai
Ra se rangeele hum mizaaj waale hai
Baaki sab basic, hum naam waale hain

Main suit payeya kaale rang da, kaale rang da
Bazaar 'ch chann koi chaddoon
Panjeba chann chann kardi, chann chann kardi
Jab chaloon toh bande maroon

Nain naini lake varge, lake varge
Paani mein kise utaaron
Figure kartoos jatti da, barood jatti da
Husn Valeti Daaru

Move that thing, move that thing
Poori raat jaane jaana meri, loop that thing
Na khatron se khelo, hoga tera nuksaan
Zara bachke rehna if I lose that thing

Maneya karo, maneya karo
Galliyan beganiyan na langeya karo
Jithon langaan main karwaan
La la la la chaaron paas

Na jatti de aase paas
Koi bhool that thing

Go shorty, it's your birthday
Celebrate hoga tera birthday poore hafte
Opps ko hum pack kara ke bhejte baste
Rappers saare chalte, kare badle unke raste

Tu jaan leti hans ke
Bahar tu mere bas ke
Kash lamba khincha tu aane lagge dhas ke
Raat ruk jao, woh dene lagi kasmein

Pyaar se woh kehti mujhe
Daddy ji, namaste

Main suit payeya kaale rang da, kaale rang da
Bazaar 'ch chann koi chaddoon
Panjeba chann chann kardi, chann chann kardi
Jab chaloon toh bande maroon

Nain naini lake varge, lake varge
Paani mein kise utaaron
Figure kartoos jatti da, barood jatti da
Husn Valeti Daaru

I wanna get tipsy, so more glasses
Aankhein teri jaana meri jaan ki pyaasi
Put your drinks up, 'cause we came to party

Main suit payeya kaale rang da, kaale rang da

Panjeba chann chann kardi, chann chann kardi

Nain naini lake varge, lake varge
Paani mein kise utaaron
Figure kartoos jatti da, barood jatti da
Husn Valeti Daaru

Tu aafat hai, tu aafat hai
Lachke toh kaala naag lage
Taapmaan badh jaata hai
Jab tu naache toh aag lage

Teri kamli jawani ka na tod
Jo bhi kar rahi tu kar baby aur
The way you go down laga ke poora zor
Tod degi lagta club ka floor

Don’t hurt nobody when you move that thing
Ka se kamariya jab DJ kare spin
Cha se chamakta paseena on the skin
Ga se gatak gayi pauni bottle, tu gin

Fa se tu phasa phasa dress daale hai

Paani mein kise utaaron
Figure kartoos jatti da, barood jatti da
Husn Valeti Daaru

Move that thing, move that thing
Poori raat jaane jaana meri, loop that thing
Na khatron se khelo, hoga tera nuksaan
Zara bachke rehna if I lose that thing

Maneya karo, maneya karo
Galliyan beganiyan na langeya karo
Jithon langaan main karwaan
La la la la chaaron paas

Na jatti de aase paas
Koi bhool that thing

Go shorty, it's your birthday
Celebrate hoga tera birthday poore hafte
Opps ko hum pack kara ke bhejte baste
Rappers saare chalte, kare badle unke raste

Tu jaan leti hans ke
Bahar tu mere bas ke
Kash lamba khincha tu aane lagge dhas ke

Pyaar se woh kehti mujhe
Daddy ji, namaste

Figure kartoos jatti da, barood jatti da
Husn Valeti Daaru

पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

२०२१ च्या ब्लॉकबस्टर “माझी बाय गो” चा भन्नाट Sequel म्हणजेच “माझी बाय”…

♪ 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : https://surl.li/mtbmjw
-------------------------------
📝 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬: Gujarati👇

હે હગુ તને મળશે તો હગુ મને મળશે...(3)
હો અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 
હે વાલુ તને મળશે તો વાલુ મને મળશે..(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 
તારા જેવુ તને મળશે મારા જેવુ મને મળશે...(૨)
હે પ્રેમ તને મળશે તો પ્રેમ મને મળશે...(૨)
અમે બોલીને ચો કયા બગાડ્યુંશે 
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 

હો બજાર ના બંગલા વાલા તને લાગ્યા
ઝૂંપડા જોઈ હવે છેટા તમે ભાગ્યા 
હો વધેલા પથરા આવ્યા મારે આડા 
અમારા થઈને અમને ભરમાયા
હો તારા વાળું તે કરી લીધુ અમેં અમારું કરી લેશું...(૨)
હે આજે તુ શે રાજી કાલે અમે રાજી...(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 

હે હગુ તને મળશે તો હગુ મને મળશે..(૨)
અમે સેકીને ચો કયા વાયુસે 
અમે બોલીને ચો કયા બગાડ્યુંશે 
હો દુનિયા માં કોઈ ના વગર ઊભુ નથી રેતુ 
પોતાના પારકા નથી સેહવાતુ 
હો વાર પછી વારો હઉ નો આવશે
આજ તારી વેળા કાલ અમારી પણ આવશે
હો આજે તુ ઘણી હરખાયશે અમે હરખાશું...(૨)
હે તમે જમો કંસાર અમે છોડશું સંસાર...(૨)
મારે તારા જેવુ ચો થાવુંશે...(૨)
હે મારા દિલ તે બહુ રડાયુશે
-------------------------------
રાકેશ બારોટ ના અન્ય ગીતો નિહાળવા માટે નીચે આપેલી લિંક ક્લિક કરો:👇

snippet.title: Holi Khele Masane Mein | Malini Awasthi | Latest Holi Songs | Holi Ke Gane | Holi 2026
snippet.description:
"Holi Khele Masane Mein" a folk Holi Song sung by the renowned folk singer Malini Awasthi. Rooted in traditional Indian folk music, this unique Holi special is dedicated to Lord Shiva. It depicts the divine and mystical Holi played by Mahadev in the cremation grounds, where colors are replaced with sacred ash and bhasm.

Unlike conventional Holi party songs, this devotional Holi bhajan reflects the spiritual and intense form of Shiva — the ascetic, the destroyer, and the eternal yogi. Through powerful vocals and authentic folk composition, this song beautifully portrays the imagery of Bhasm Holi, spiritual detachment, and divine celebration beyond worldly colors.

If you are searching for Shiv Holi song, Malini Awasthi song, devotional Holi songs, Mahadev bhajan, or Shiv bhakti song, this track is a must-add to your playlist. Perfect for Maha Shivratri, Holi celebrations, bhajan sandhya, and devotional gatherings.

Experience a different shade of Holi — one of devotion, vairagya, and divine energy.

#HoliSong #ShivHoli #MaliniAwasthi #Mahadev #BholeNath #DevotionalSongs #FolkHoli #ShivBhajan #HoliSpecial #holikhelemasanemein #holikhelemasanemeinsong #masanekiholi

en.title: Holi Khele Masane Mein | Malini Awasthi | Latest Holi Songs | Holi Ke Gane | Holi 2026
en.description:
"Holi Khele Masane Mein" a folk Holi Song sung by the renowned folk singer Malini Awasthi. Rooted in traditional Indian folk music, this unique Holi special is dedicated to Lord Shiva. It depicts the divine and mystical Holi played by Mahadev in the cremation grounds, where colors are replaced with sacred ash and bhasm.

Unlike conventional Holi party songs, this devotional Holi bhajan reflects the spiritual and intense form of Shiva — the ascetic, the destroyer, and the eternal yogi. Through powerful vocals and authentic folk composition, this song beautifully portrays the imagery of Bhasm Holi, spiritual detachment, and divine celebration beyond worldly colors.

If you are searching for Shiv Holi song, Malini Awasthi song, devotional Holi songs, Mahadev bhajan, or Shiv bhakti song, this track is a must-add to your playlist. Perfect for Maha Shivratri, Holi celebrations, bhajan sandhya, and devotional gatherings.

Experience a different shade of Holi — one of devotion, vairagya, and divine energy.

चुडिया सोहे हाँ चुडिया सोहे,
बंसी बजावे नन्द लाल कह दो राधा रानी से,
वृन्दावन में उड़े रे गुलाल कह दो राधा रानी से…………

جنگی تخروپن اصل نقلی سے مختلف ہو سکتا ہے۔
ہم نے خبروں میں شائع ہونے والے مضامین کو نقل کیا۔

snippet.title: YUNG DSA - RADE RAPATE | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO | PROD BY ‪@starboibeatz‬ | GULLY GANG RECORDS | 2026
snippet.description:
Stream Rade Rapate on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7CE7aGWKmQ1oqATMZkDsFf?si=3e9ee4b984764be2

“RADE RAPATE” is a raw cultural hip-hop anthem straight from the streets of Pune, Yerwada 06. Blending authentic Maharashtrian instruments with hard-hitting old school and new school hip-hop drums, YUNG DSA brings a powerful sound that represents the streets, the culture, and the hunger of coming from zero.

The track carries the fearless energy of Marathi street slang, turning a local expression into a global hip-hop statement. With aggressive flows, cultural sounds, and raw visuals, RADE RAPATE represents the voice of the underground and the pride of Pune’s hip-hop movement.

This isn’t just music - this is culture, struggle, and representation.

Representing PUNE | YERWADA 06
Representing INDIAN HIP HOP 


Audio Credits:

Artist/Lyrics/Composition: YUNG DSA 
Produced by: Starboi Beatz 
Mixing & Mastering: Pixlpxl 
Recording Studio: Headbang Studio
Engineer: Cosmodrop
A&R: Amit Ojha 

Video Credits:

Directed by: YUNG DSA & Aryan Samant
DOP: Aryan Samant 
Editor: Aryan Samant
Assistant DOP: Subodh Vankatte
Drone Operator: Sagar

snippet.title: Rang Barse Bheege Chunarwali | Silsila | Amitabh Bachchan | Rekha | Holi Special Song
snippet.description:
नमस्कार दोस्तों!

आज हम आपके लिए लेकर आए हैं अमिताभ बच्चन के सदाबहार नगमों का एक खूबसूरत गुलदस्ता, जो आपके होली के रंग को और भी गहरा कर देगा। अमिताभ बच्चन, एक ऐसा नाम जो भारतीय सिनेमा के इतिहास में सुनहरे अक्षरों में लिखा गया है। उनकी आवाज में वो जादू है, जो हर दिल को छू जाता है। ये गाने आपको 1980 के दशक की यादों में ले जाएंगे, जब संगीत में सादगी और गहराई दोनों हुआ करती थी। इन गीतों में छिपी खुशी, उत्साह और प्रेम की भावनाएं आज भी हमारे दिलों को उमंग से भर देती हैं।

इस संकलन में, हमने अमिताभ बच्चन के उन खास गानों को शामिल किया है जो आपके होली के त्यौहार को और भी यादगार बना देंगे। ये गाने न सिर्फ मनोरंजन करते हैं, बल्कि हमें जीवन के हर पल को खुशी से जीने की प्रेरणा भी देते हैं। तो आइये, इस संगीतमय सफर में हमारे साथ जुड़िए और महसूस कीजिए उस दौर की मस्ती और जादू को।


00:00:05 Rang Barse Bheege Chunarwali 


Credits :

Song: Rang Barse Bheege Chunarwali
Album: Silsila
Artist: Amitabh Bachchan
Music Director: Shiv-Hari
Lyricist: Harivansh Rai Bachchan 


अगर आपको यह वीडियो पसंद आया हो तो इसे लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपने पसंदीदा गाने का नाम बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें। आपका साथ ही हमें और बेहतर करने की प्रेरणा देता है।

संगीत की यह जादू हमेशा बनी रहे…

snippet.title: जोगी जी धीरे धीरे 🌸| Holi Special HD Song | होली गीत | Desi Holi Vibes | Sachin & Sadhana Singh
snippet.description:
Song: Jogi Ji Dheere Dheere
Movie: Nadiya Ke Paar (1982)
Singers: Chandrani Mukherjee, Hemlata, Jaspal Singh
Music: Ravindra Jain
Lyrics: Ravindra Jain
Cast: Sachin, Sadhana Singh
Director: Govind Moonis

Lyrics 👇
जोगीजी धीरे-धीरे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
नदी के तीरे-तीरे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

जोगीजी कोई ढूँढे मूँगा कोई ढूँढे मोतिया
हम ढूँढे अपनी जोगनिया को
जोगीजी ढूँढ के लादो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
मिला दो हमें मिलादो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

फागुन आयो ओ मस्ती लायो
भरके मारे पिचकारी सारा रा रा रा रा
रंग लेके ओ जंग लेके
मारे जोगी रातें जागी सारी आरारा रा रा रा
जोगीरा आ र र रा रा, जोगीरा आ र र रा रा

जोगीजी नींद ना आवे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
सजन की याद सतावे, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
जोगीजी प्रेम का रोग लगा हमको
कोई इसकी दवा यदि हो तो कहो

बुरी है ये बीमारी, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
लगे है दुनिया खारी, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

सारे गाँव की गोरियाँ रंग गई हमपे डार
पर जिसके रंग हम रंगे छुप गई वो गुलनार
छुप गईं वो गुलनार जोगीजी सूना है सँसार
छुप गईं वो गुलनार जोगीजी सूना है सँसार

बिना उसे रंग लगाए, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
ये फागुन लौट ना जाए, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

जोगीजी कोई ढूँढे मूँगा, कोई ढूँढे मोतिया
हम ढूँढे अपनी जोगनिया को
जोगीजी ढूँढ के लादो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी
मिला दो हमें मिलादो, जोगीजी वाह जोगीजी

छुपती डोले राधिका ढूँढ सके घनश्याम

snippet.title: तेरी मुरली की धुन सुनने मैं बरसाने से आयी   Teri Murli Ki Dhun   Most Popular Radha Krishna #bhajan
snippet.description:
hiतेरी मुरली की धुन सुनने मैं बरसाने से आयी   Teri Murli Ki Dhun   Most Popular Radha Krishna #bhajan
🙏 तेरी मुरली की धुन सुनने मैं बरसाने से आयी हूँ | श्री राधा कृष्ण भजन 🙏
यह एक मनमोहक भजन है जो श्रीकृष्ण और राधा रानी के दिव्य प्रेम को दर्शाता है।
इस गीत में राधा रानी की भावनाएँ व्यक्त की गई हैं जब वो श्रीकृष्ण की मधुर मुरली की धुन सुनकर बरसाने से वृंदावन आती हैं।

🎶 गीत की विशेषताएँ:

मन को भक्ति से भर देने वाली धुन
सुंदर राधा-कृष्ण भाव
आत्मिक शांति और प्रेम का अनुभव

🌸 जय श्री राधे कृष्णा 🙏
📌 Like | Share | Subscribe करें और और भी भक्ति गीत सुनें।


🙏 Teri Murli Ki Dhun Sunne Main Barsane Se Aayi Hoon | Radha Krishna Bhajan 🙏
A soulful devotional song that beautifully expresses Radha Rani’s love and devotion for *Lord Krishna*.
In this bhajan, Radha comes from Barsana to Vrindavan, enchanted by the divine melody of Krishna’s flute.


Heart-touching Krishna bhakti song
Soulful Radha Krishna lyrics
Brings peace, devotion, and divine connection

🌸 Jai Shri Radhe Krishna 🙏
📌 Don’t forget to like, share & subscribe for more beautiful bhajans.

A soulful devotional song that beautifully expresses Radha Rani’s love and devotion for *Lord Krishna*.
In this bhajan, Radha comes from Barsana to Vrindavan, enchanted by the divine melody of Krishna’s flute.


Heart-touching Krishna bhakti song
Soulful Radha Krishna lyrics
Brings peace, devotion, and divine connection

🌸 Jai Shri Radhe Krishna 🙏

snippet.description:

🎤 Lyrics: Rema - Calm Down 

[Intro]
(Vibez)
Another banger

[Chorus]
Baby, calm down, calm down
Girl, this your body e put my heart for lockdown, for lockdown, oh, lockdown
Girl, you sweet like Fanta, ooh, Fanta, ooh
If I tell you say, "I love you," no dey form yanga, oh, oh, yanga, oh
No tell me no, no, no, no, whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Baby, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa
You got me like, "Whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa"
Shawty, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa, mm-hm

[Verse 1]
I see this fine girl for my party, she wear yellow
Every other girl, they dey do too much but this girl mellow
Na'im I dey find situation I go use take tell am, "Hello"
Finally, I find way to talk to the girl, but she no wan follow
Who you come dey form for-whoa? (Mm-hm)
Why you no wan conform-whoa? (Mm-hm)
Then I start to feel her bum-bum, warm (Mm-hm)
But she dey gimme small, small-whoa
I know say she sabi pass that one-one (Mm-hm)
But she feeling insecure-whoa
'Cause her friends go dey gum her like chewing gum-whoa (Mm-hm)
Go dey gum her like chewing gum-whoa, whoa-whoa, oh

[Chorus]
Baby, calm down, calm down
Girl, this your body e put my heart for lockdown, for lockdown, oh, lockdown
Girl, you sweet like Fanta, ooh, Fanta, ooh
If I tell you say, "I love you," no dey form yanga, oh, oh, yanga, oh
No tell me no, no, no, no, whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Baby, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa
You got me like, "Whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa"
Shawty, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa, mm-hm

[Verse 2]
As I reach my house, I say make I rest small-whoa (Make a rest small-whoa)
As me I wake up, na she dey my mind, oh-whoa (Na she dey my mind, oh-whoa)
Day one, day two-wo, I no fit focus (I no fit focus)
Na so me I call am, say, "Make we link up" (I say make we link up)
As I start to dey tell her how I feel, now my heart dey race
Baby girl, if you leave me, I no go love again
Because e get many girls wey put my heart for pain
Shebi, you feel my pain? Yeah, yeah

[Chorus]

Girl, this your body e put my heart for lockdown, for lockdown, oh, lockdown
Girl, you sweet like Fanta, ooh, Fanta, ooh
If I tell you say, "I love you," no dey form yanga, oh, oh, yanga, oh

Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh

You got me like, "Whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa"
Shawty, come gimme your lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-lo-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa-whoa, mm-hm
